title: FirmaSupplementaries
description: A compatibility addon for Supplementaries and TerraFirmaCraft
body:
This mod aims to provide compatibility between [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries) by the Supplementaries Dev Team and the total conversion mod [TerraFirmaCraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrafirmacraft) (TFC) by the TFC Dev Team. As an addon, it requires both Supplementaries and TFC to work.

The changes done for compatibility are extensive, but to name a few important things:
- Recipes adjusted for items obtainable in TFC
- Light sources burn out like in TFC. Now you can use candle holders, sconces, and fire pits as balanced light sources!
- Sacks now act more like large vessels, but they can be used to also transport large items
- Pancakes, Candy, and Goblets work with TFC. Nutrition, expiration dates, all working (even with pancakes placed down as blocks!)
- Gunpowder trails can light up TFC blocks, everything from powderkegs to blast furnaces and firepits

A more extensive list of changes, including details like config settings can be found on the github README.txt file.
If you have any issues, please report them on github!
